title: GEEPAS 24V Travel Kettle | Stainless Steel Portable Auto Shut Off Concealed Boil-dry Protection | Electric Kettle for Camping Caravan Van Road Trips with Cigarette Lighter | 2 Year Warranty 500ml
features: ✅ PERFECT FOR TRAVEL, CAMPING & ROAD TRIPS-This compact camping kettle is purpose-built for camping, caravanning, and long road journeys, making hot drinks easily accessible on the go. Electric kettle fits effortlessly in luggage or storage spaces. Ideal for travellers who never want to miss their tea or coffee.

✅ COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT FOR EASY STORAGE-With its lightweight and space-saving design, this small kettle is easy to carry and store in vehicles, backpacks, or cupboards. It’s travel-friendly without sacrificing functionality. Perfect for mobile lifestyles and limited space setups.

✅ 500ML CAPACITY – IDEAL FOR TWO CUPS-The 500ML capacity provides just the right amount to make 2 cups of tea, coffee, or instant beverages. Travel kettle to take on holiday is great for individuals or couples on the go. Enjoy hot drinks wherever you are, without wasting time or water.

✅ ERGONOMIC HANDLE FOR SAFE POURING-Designed for comfortable handling, the ergonomic handle ensures safe, controlled pouring even when the low wattage kettle is full. Reduces the risk of spills and burns. An essential safety feature for travel and vehicle use.

✅ CONCEALED HEATING ELEMENT FOR QUICK BOILING-The concealed heating element delivers fast and efficient boiling while keeping the interior smooth and easy to clean. No exposed coils in stainless steel kettle means better hygiene and durability. Boil water faster wherever your journey takes you.
description: Product Description CONCEALED HEATING ELEMENT Concealed heating element ensures quick boiling & smooth interior for easy, hassle-free cleaning. CIGARETTE LIGHTER DESIGN Plugs into 24V car sockets for easy, convenient heating—ideal for travel, camping, and road trips. ERGONOMIC HANDLE Ergonomic handle offers safe, easy pouring with full kettle—ideal for travel & low wattage use. AUTO SHUT OFF Travel kettle with boil-dry protection & auto shut-off ensures safe use even when water runs low. SAFE POURING DESIGN Reduces spills & burns risk—essential safety feature for travel, home use & on-the-go convenience. 500ML WATER CAPACITY The capacity is 500ML, will be good size for making multiple cups of tea or coffee. VEHICLE SOCKET COMPATIBLE Enjoy hot drinks on the go—plugs into your car’s cigarette lighter for quick and easy heating. IDEAL FOR TRAVEL Perfect for drivers & travellers—keeps coffee, tea, or water hot during long trips or busy workdays.
